hero.h1: Stop losing money to a broken product feed.
hero.subheadline: Disapproved products, weak titles, and low CTR are costing you sales every day. Cartozo fixes your Google Merchant feed automatically—so every SKU gets seen, clicked, and bought.
hero.trust_line: No setup. No spreadsheets. No guesswork.

header.title: Stop losing money to a broken product feed.
header.subtitle: Disapproved products, weak titles, and low CTR are costing you sales every day. Cartozo fixes your Google Merchant feed automatically—so every SKU gets seen, clicked, and bought.

pain_solution.title: Your product feed is silently bleeding money

items.label: Products get rejected
items.text: Google Merchant disapproves your listings for reasons you can't easily trace. Traffic drops. Budget burns.

items.label: Titles don't attract clicks
items.text: Generic titles miss the search terms buyers use. Your ads show but nobody clicks—and you pay for impressions anyway.

items.label: Fixing it takes forever
items.text: Manual feed cleanup in spreadsheets is slow, error-prone, and has to be redone every time you add products.

items.label: You have no visibility
items.text: You can't tell which products perform or why. No score, no baseline, no way to improve what you can't measure.

pain_solution.solution: Cartozo fixes all of this in minutes. Upload a CSV, get an optimized feed.

how_it_works.title: From broken feed to live in 3 steps
steps: Upload your product feed CSV—no template required
Cartozo detects errors, scores quality, and rebuilds titles around real search intents
Export your clean, Merchant-ready feed and push it straight to Google

social_proof.quote: We cleaned up 3 months of feed issues in one afternoon. Cartozo did what our team couldn't find time to do.

roi.text: Even a 10% improvement in your feed quality can mean significantly more clicks, lower CPCs, and higher ROAS—without touching your bids or budget.

final_cta.title: Your competitors are already optimizing their feeds.

seo_footer.text: Cartozo helps e-commerce managers, performance marketers, and agencies fix Google Merchant Center disapprovals, optimize product titles for real search intent, and export clean feeds at scale—without manual spreadsheet work or technical setup.
